note: open enrollment window: start and end dates with review/complete actions

message.subject: Open enrollment is coming
message.body_text: Open enrollment for your 2027 health plan runs from November 1, 2026 to December 15, 2026. Review plan options and complete your election before the window closes.

note: auto policy renewal: date, new premium, and premium change amount

message.subject: Your policy renews soon
message.body_text: Your auto policy renews on 08/03/2026. Your new six-month premium is $742.18, a change of $31 from your current term. No action is needed if autopay is enabled.

note: claim documents deadline with upload action

message.subject: Documents needed for claim CLM-88412
message.body_text: Regarding claim #CLM-88412: we need photos of the damage and the repair estimate. Upload the documents by July 17, 2026 or your claim may be closed.

note: appointment reminder with complete and call actions

message.subject: Appointment reminder
message.body_text: This is a reminder of your annual physical with Dr. Alvarez on 06/26/2026 at 2:15 PM. Complete the check-in forms online before your visit. Call 555-0160 to reschedule.

note: medical bill: patient responsibility amount with due date

message.subject: Your statement is ready
message.body_text: Your statement from Lakeside Medical Group is ready. Patient responsibility: $186.40 after insurance. Payment is due by 07/20/2026. Pay online or call billing with questions.

note: EOB: only the you-may-owe amount is a true obligation; billed and plan-paid amounts are FP traps; past visit date

message.subject: Your explanation of benefits
message.body_text: An explanation of benefits is available for your visit on June 3, 2026. Amount billed: $420.00. Plan paid: $336.00. You may owe: $84.00. This is not a bill.

note: cancellation warning: effective date and past-due premium

message.subject: Policy cancellation warning
message.body_text: Your renters insurance policy will be canceled for non-payment effective July 1, 2026 unless the past-due premium of $23.75 is received before that date.

message.subject: Refill available
message.body_text: Your prescription #RX-3304 is ready for refill. Refills remaining: 2. Your prescription expires on 09/12/2026. Schedule a renewal appointment with your provider before it lapses.

note: dental recall: schedule is a real suggested action, promo price is marketing (FP trap)

message.subject: Time for your next cleaning
message.body_text: It has been 6 months since your last cleaning. Schedule your next dental cleaning at your convenience. New patient special: exam and x-rays for $79.

note: FSA deadline: remaining balance is user-relevant, use-it-or-lose-it date

message.subject: Use your FSA funds
message.body_text: You have $312.55 remaining in your FSA. Funds must be used by December 31, 2026 or they will be forfeited. Submit claims for eligible expenses through the member portal.

note: lab results: sign-in and send-message are explicit actions, no dates or amounts

message.subject: New lab results available
message.body_text: New lab results are available in your patient portal. Sign in to view your results. If you have questions, send a message to your care team.

note: grace period: past missed due date is an FP trap, grace end date and premium are real

message.subject: Premium payment missed
message.body_text: We did not receive your life insurance premium of $58.20 due on 06/10/2026. Your 31-day grace period ends 07/11/2026. Pay before the grace period ends to keep coverage in force.

note: in-category negative: approved claim reimbursement, company timeline is not a user deadline

message.subject: Your claim was approved
message.body_text: Good news: your claim #CLM-77231 has been approved. A reimbursement of $215.00 will be deposited to your account within 5 business days. No action is required.
